from pathlib import Path
p=Path("/mnt/data/text_to_analyse.txt")
text=p.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
len(text), text[:1000]

from pathlib import Path
p=Path("/mnt/data/file-2G1Uy9aDDZCzuFepXqE3dt-text_to_analyse.txt")
print(p.exists())
text=p.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
text[:1000], len(text)

text = open("/mnt/data/file-2G1Uy9aDDZCzuFepXqE3dt-text_to_analyse.txt", encoding="utf-8").read()
ayah = "وَالَّذِينَ إِذَا أَسَرُّواْ قَالُواْ أَسْتَغْفِرُواْ لَهُمْ وَإِذَا لَقُواْ لَعَنُوهُمْ وَإِذَا سَمِعُواْ كُلَّمَةٍ مِّنَ الظَّالِمِينَ لَتَأْخُذَهُمْ عَنْهَا يَعْلَمُ اللّهُ أَنَّكُمْ إِذًا لَّتُؤْخَذُونَ فَكَثِيرًا وَمَا اللّهُ بِغَافِلٍ عَمَّا تَعْمَلُونَ"
hadith ="من رأى منكم منكراً فليغيره بيده، فإن لم يستطع فبلسانه، فإن لم يستطع فبقلبه، وذلك أضعف الإيمان"
text.find(ayah), text.find(hadith)

idxs=[]
start = 0
while True:
    i = text.find(hadith, start)
    if i==-1:
        break
    idxs.append(i)
    start = i+1
idxs, len(idxs)
[i for i in range(len(text)) if text.startswith(ayah, i)][:5]

start_ayah = text.find(ayah)
end_ayah = start_ayah+len(ayah)
start_hadiths = [i for i in range(len(text)) if text.startswith(hadith, i)]
[(i, text[i-5:i+len(hadith)+5]) for i in start_hadiths[:2]]

ayah_start = text.find(ayah)
ayah_end = ayah_start + len(ayah)
hadith_start_end = [(i, i+len(hadith)) for i in text.find(hadith,0),]

hadith_positions = [i for i in range(len(text)) if text.startswith(hadith, i)]
[(i, i+len(hadith)) for i in hadith_positions[:5]]

text = text
ayah_start = text.find(ayah)
ayah_end = ayah_start + len(ayah)
ayah_start, ayah_end, len(ayah), text[ayah_start:ayah_end] == ayah

starts = hadith_positions
ends = [s+len(hadith) for s in starts]
texts = [text[s:e] for s,e in zip(starts,ends)]
list(zip(starts,ends,texts[:2]))

import json
citation_entries=[]
# Ayah
citation_entries.append({"span_start": ayah_start, "span_end": ayah_end, "span_text": ayah, "citation_type": "Aya"})
for s,e in zip(starts, ends):
    citation_entries.append({"span_start": s, "span_end": e, "span_text": text[s:e], "citation_type": "Hadith"})
len(citation_entries), citation_entries[:2], citation_entries[-1]
